name: Special Long-Cook Chicken
recipeIngredient: 2 large Cooking apples, cored and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1 Thoroughly clean the chicken under running water and remove its skin.
2 Put about a third of the sliced apples in the bottom of the crockpot.
3 Place the chicken on top of the apples.
4 Mix together the beer, water, oyster sauce, soy sauce, sesame oil, and orange peel.
5 Place the rest of the sliced apples on top of the chicken.
6 Pour the liquid mixture over the contents of the crockpot.
7 Put the crockpot on low heat in the morning.
8 Turn the setting to high 6-8 hours later.
9 Cook on high for at least an hour.
10 Remove the chicken from the pot and serve with rice, steamed vegetables such as pea pods, and the cooked apples on the side.
